admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.subtitle: d20 Folio · System Administration
admin.blockConfirmBody: They lose access to the app immediately: no sign-in, no sheets, no campaigns. You can unblock them here at any time.
admin.accessDesc: This page is restricted to the app administrator.
admin.charactersLoadError: Could not load this user's characters.
admin.deleteWarning: This removes the user's characters, portraits, campaign memberships, and sign-in: everything, irreversibly. Their campaigns are reassigned to another member, or removed if empty.
admin.bugErrorHint: GitHub issue creation failed; re-file manually.
admin.bugClosureUnknown: Couldn't reach GitHub to check issue status. Showing all reports, including any already closed.
